description: Triangular prism with an equilateral triangle cross-section, circumscribed circle diameter of 30mm, extruded to 50mm with the cross-section centroid at the origin.
notes: To center the centroid of the equilateral triangle at the origin (0,0): if one vertex is aligned with the positive Y-axis, the three vertices of the triangle are at (0, 15), (-12.99, -7.5), and (12.99, -7.5). Extrude this profile along the Z-axis by 50mm (either from z=0 to 50 or symmetrically from z=-25 to 25).
